name: Retrieve 1 Beetle Shell.
details: Defeat Grave Beetles on floors 6-15 of the 1st block, Thebel, to retrieve 1 Beetle Shell.

name: Retrieve the first old document.
details: Retrieve Old Document 01 from the top of the 1st block, Thebel, and return here before the deadline.

name: I'd like to sip a Muscle Drink.
details: Have you tried a Muscle Drink? I am curious how it tastes. Can you please bring me one?
notes: Aohige Pharmacy (4/22); Tanaka's Amazing Commodities (5/3 / 6/21); Common chests within Tartarus and Monad

name: Retrieve 3 Old Lanterns.
details: Defeat Phantom Mages on floors 17-24 of the 2nd block, Arqa, to retrieve 3 Old Lanterns.

name: Retrieve the second old document.
details: Retrieve Old Document 02 from the middle of the 2nd block, Arqa, and return here before the deadline.

name: Create Jack Frost with Dia.
details: Please create Jack Frost via fusion, and show me that he has the healing skill Dia.
notes: Pixie + Unicorn; Unlocks #8

name: Retrieve 1 Lead Medal.
details: Defeat the Wealth Hand, a rare monster in the 1st block, Thebel, to retrieve 1 Lead Medal.
notes: Unlocks #14

name: Create Valkyrie with Tarukaja.
details: Please create Valkyrie via fusion, and show me that she has the supportive skill Tarukaja.
notes: Forneus + Yomotsu Shikome; Allows the creation of Pale Rider; Unlocks #15

name: Retrieve 5 Bronze Figurines.
details: Defeat Bronze Dice on floors 41-46 of the 2nd block, Arqa, to retrieve 5 Bronze Figurines.

name: Retrieve 3 Snake Scale. sic
details: Defeat the Lustful Snakes in the 2nd block, Arqa, that are surrounded by a red glow to retrieve 3 Snake Scales.

name: Retrieve the third old document.
details: Retrieve Old Document 03 from the top of the 2nd block, Arqa, and return here before the deadline.

name: Retrieve 1 Goggle-eyed Idol.
details: I heard there's a rare item in your world known as a Goggle-eyed Idol. I'd like very much to see it.
notes: Shinshoudo Antiques: Turquoise x2; Unlocks #16

name: Retrieve the shell of a man.
details: I heard there's a creepy-looking model in your world that's used for scientific study. I'd like to see it.
notes: Retrieve the Anatomical Model from the school Laboratory

name: Retrieve 1 Steel Medal.
details: Defeat the Treasure Hand, a rare monster in the 2nd block, Arqa, to retrieve 1 Steel Medal.
notes: Unlocks #21

name: Create Oberon (lv 17+)
details: Create Oberon via fusion, and return here once he is level 17 or higher.
notes: Jack Frost + Alp, level to 17+ through Social Links or battles; Unlocks #22

name: Bring me strong medicine.
details: I've heard there's a powerful, possibly dangerous medicine in the nurse's office. I would like a sample of it.
notes: Visit the Nurse's Office in Gekkoukan High School when Sick or Tired, then choose "Don't drink."

name: I'd like some funky school music.
details: I'd like to listen to a song that is associated with your school...
notes: Retrieve from the school PA Room

name: Retrieve 5 Relic Fragments.
details: Defeat Creation Relics on floors 65-77 of the 3rd block, Yabbashah, to retrieve 5 Relic Fragments.

name: Retrieve 3 Greasy Gears.
details: Defeat the Wild Drives in the 3rd block, Yabbashah, that are surrounded by a red glow to retrieve 3 Greasy Gears.

name: Retrieve the fourth old document.
details: Retrieve Old Document 04 from the middle of the 3rd block, Yabbashah, and return here before the deadline.

name: Retrieve 1 Bronze Medal.
details: Defeat the Supreme Hand, a rare monster in the 3rd block, Yabbashah, to retrieve 1 Bronze Medal.

name: Create Vetala with Maragi.
details: Please create Vetala via fusion, and show me that he has the Fire skill Maragi.
notes: Pyro Jack + Jack Frost + Narcissus; Allows the creation of King Frost; Unlocks #23

name: Create Orthrus with Dodge Slash.
details: Please create Orthrus via fusion, and show me that he has the skill Dodge Slash.
notes: Valkyrie + Queen Mab + Ares; Unlocks #29

name: Retrieve 5 Tiara's Hair.
details: Defeat Shouting Tiaras on floors 102-113 of the 3rd block, Yabbashah, to retrieve 5 Tiara's Hair.

name: Retrieve 4 Knight's Reins.
details: Defeat Champion Knights in the 3rd block, Yabbashah, that are surrounded by a red glow to retrieve 4 Knight's Reins.

name: Retrieve the fifth old document.
details: Retrieve Old Document 05 from the top of the 3rd block, Yabbashah, and return here before the deadline.

name: Retrieve 1 Platinum Watch.
details: Will you please buy for me 1 Platinum Watch from your world?
notes:
Police Station
(the protagonist must be level 26)

name: I'd like a drink that shares my name.I'd like a drink with my sister's name.
details: I've heard there's a drink in your world that shares my name... I'd like to try it someday.I've heard there's a drink in your world that shares my sister's name... I'd like to try it someday.
notes: Visit Que Sera Sera on the outskirts of Port Island Station, requires high Charm

name: Create Oumitsunu (lv 33+).
details: Create Oumitsunu via fusion, and return here once he is level 33 or higher.
notes: Fuse Flauros + Oberon, level to 33+ through Social Links or battles; Allows the creation of Nata Taishi; Unlocks #36

name: Retrieve 1 Homunculus.
details: I've heard there's something in your world called a "Homunculus." Can you bring me 1?
notes: Shinshoudo Antiques: Diamond x1 + Sapphire x1; Tanaka's Amazing Commodities (8/17); Walk Koromaru; Dropped by Phantom King (Harabah 190F); Luck Door (Vision Quest); Rare chests in Arqa, Yabbashah, Tziah, Harabah, Adamah; Fixed chest in Yabbashah (85F)

name: Find me a beautiful tile.
details: I've heard there are small square tiles in your world with peacocks on them. I'd like to see one, if possible.
notes: Go to Mahjong Club "Red Hawk" on the outskirts of Port Island Station; Unlocks #38

name: Retrieve 1 Silver Medal.
details: Defeat the Opulent Hand, a rare monster in the 4th block, Tziah, to retrieve 1 Silver Medal.

name: Retrieve 5 Empress's Mirrors.
details: Defeat Elegant Mothers on floors 126-138 of the 4th block, Tziah, to retrieve 5 Empress's Mirrors.

name: Retrieve 3 Gold Handguard. sic
details: Defeat Hakurou Mushas in the 4th block, Tziah, that are surrounded by a red glow to retrieve 3 Gold Handguards.

name: Retrieve the sixth old document.
details: Retrieve Old Document 06 from the middle of the 4th block, Tziah, and return here before the deadline.

name: Create Black Frost.
details: Create Black Frost via fusion and bring him here. Please do not confuse him with any other Frost.
notes: King Frost + Jack Frost + Pyro Jack + Queen Mab; Unlocks #42

name: Bring me 3 Jack Frost Dolls.
details: I've heard there are Jack Frost dolls in your world. I want one to display, one to trade, and one for myself...
notes: Win from the crane game at Paulownia Mall

name: I'd like to try sushi.
details: I've heard there's a food in your world called "sushi." I'd like to try it someday...
notes: Get Inari Sushi from Naganaki Shrine, requires high Academics ; Unlocks #64

name: Retrieve 3 Gold Rings.
details: Defeat Wondrous Magi on floors 151-159 of the 4th block, Tziah, to retrieve 3 Gold Rings.

name: Retrieve 2 Red Armor Plates.
details: Defeat Scarlet Turrets in the 4th block, Tziah, that are surrounded by a red glow to retrieve 2 Red Armor Plates.

name: Retrieve the seventh old document.
details: Retrieve Old Document 07 from the top of the 4th block, Tziah, and return here before the deadline.

name: Create Girimehkala.
details: Create the Persona Girimehkala via fusion and return here.
notes: Gurr + Rangda + Vetala + Taraka; Allows the creation of Nebiros; Unlocks #43

name: Create Daisoujou.
details: Create the Persona Daisoujou via fusion and return here.
notes: Mithra + Ara Mitama + Kusi Mitama + Saki Mitama + Nigi Mitama; Unlocks #48

name: Retrieve 6 Pink Feathers.
details: Defeat Gracious Cupids on floors 181-190 of the 5th block, Harabah, to retrieve 6 Pink Feathers.

name: Retrieve 3 Moon Tablets.
details: Defeat Ruinous Idols in the 5th block, Harabah, that are surrounded by a red glow to retrieve 3 Moon Tablets.

name: Retrieve the last old document.
details: Retrieve Old Document 08 from the top of the 5th block, Harabah, and return here before the deadline.

name: Retrieve 2 Gold Medals.
details: Defeat Luxury Hands, rare monsters in the 5th block, Harabah, to retrieve 2 Gold Medals.

name: Create Alice with Megido.
details: Please create Alice via fusion, and show me that she has the Almighty skill Megido.
notes: Oberon + Decarabia → Nata Taishi (with Megido) + Lilim + Pixie + Narcissus; Allows the creation of Lilith

name: Retrieve 3 Sand of Time.
details: Defeat Perpetual Sands on floors 202-210 of the 5th block, Harabah, to retrieve 3 Sand of Time.

name: Retrieve 3 Rainbow Hairs.
details: Defeat Daring Gigases in the 5th block, Harabah, that are surrounded by a red glow to retrieve 3 Rainbow Hairs.

name: Create Lilith with Mabufudyne.
details: Please create Lilith via fusion, and show me that she has the Ice skill Mabufudyne.
notes: Gabriel (Lvl 71) + Ara Mitama → Succubus (with Mabufudyne) + Lilim + Vetala + Incubus

name: Create Loki (lv 63+).
details: Create Loki via fusion, and return here once he is Lv 63 or higher.
notes: Legion + Ose + Decarabia; Level to 63+ via Social Links or battles; Allows the creation of Masakado

name: Retrieve 1 Bloody Button.
details: This is a difficult request... Defeat The Reaper and retrieve 1 Bloody Button.
notes: Stay on a floor in Tartarus for about five minutes (faster if all Shadows are defeated) for the Reaper to spawn

name: Retrieve 3 Platinum Medals.
details: Defeat Glorious Hands, rare monsters in the 6th block, Adamah, to retrieve 3 Platinum Medals.

name: Defeat the ultimate opponent.
details: Far below, beyond a door by the entrance of Tartarus, lies the ultimate adversary. Please fight this opponent alone.
notes: This request is only available in New Game+. Descend to the bottom of Monad and win the solo fight.

name: I'd like to visit Paulownia Mall.
details: I've taken an interest in your world. Please show me around the Paulownia Mall during the daytime.
notes: Go on a date with Elizabeth/Theodore (Daytime, does not use up any time); Allows the creation of Hua Po

name: I'd like to visit Iwatodai Station.
details: I would like to explore your world further. Please take me to Iwatodai after school.
notes: Go on a date with Elizabeth/Theodore (Daytime, does not use up any time); Allows the creation of Empusa

name: I'd like to visit Naganaki Shrine.
details: I would like to explore your world further. Please take me to Naganaki Shrine before the sun sets.
notes: Go on a date with Elizabeth/Theodore (Daytime, does not use up any time); Allows the creation of Thoth

name: I'd like to visit Gekkoukan High.
details: I can no longer hide my curiosity about your world. Please take me to Gekkoukan High after school.
notes: Go on a date with Elizabeth/Theodore (Daytime, does not use up any time); Allows the creation of Hell Biker

name: I'd like to visit your room.
details: I can't wait to explore your world further... I'd like to see what your room looks like after school.
notes: Go on a date with Elizabeth/Theodore (Daytime, does not use up any time); Allows the creation of Kartikeya

name: Bring me a Sengoku-era helm.
details: I would like to see the "helm" from the Sengoku era... I heard that there is one who is never without it.
notes: Accept the request, then visit the Faculty Office seven times

name: I'd like to try Oden Juice.
details: I would love to try your world's "Oden Juice"... The drink-loving girl near the persimmon tree may have some.
notes: Buy 1 of every vending machine drink during the Kyoto trip, then talk to the girl by the Persimmon Tree in Gekkoukan High School's first floor corridor

name: Bring me food fit for a wolf.
details: Please bring me some Gourmet Dog Food. You may be able to get some on 11/12, when he who holds it is in a good mood.
notes: Obtain from Koromaru on 11/12

name: Please go scrub the bathroom.
details: Scrubbing the bathroom is a difficult, but necessary, task... Take your brush in hand and help clean the floors.
notes: Clean the Port Island Station restrooms while the Scrub Brush is not equipped

name: Please go water the flowers.
details: When I visited Gekkoukan High School, I saw a neglected patch of flowers. Could you bring them some water?
notes: Interact with the flowers on the school's rooftop

name: Please go feed the cat.
details: I heard there's a cat which hasn't eaten in a while. Can you find the poor cat and give it some food...?
notes: Buy four Super Cat Foods from Aohige Pharmacy and feed the cat located in the back alley of Port Island Station four times on four different days

name: Bring me a Featherman figure.
details: I'd like an action figure of Phoenix Ranger Featherman R. I think its owner will be in a good mood on 11/21...
notes: Obtain from Ken on 11/21

name: Bring me a Juzumaru.
details: I would like to see a katana obtainable from Thebel, the first block: the Juzumaru.
notes: Shuffle Time (Sword 2); Rare chests in Thebel (4F, 11F)

name: Bring me an Onimaru Kunitsuna.
details: I would like to see a katana obtainable from Yabbashah, the third block: the Onimaru Kunitsuna.
notes: Shuffle Time (Sword 5); Rare chests in Yabbashah (69F, 74F, 82F)

name: Bring me a Mikazuki Munechika.
details: I would like to see a katana obtainable from Tziah, the fourth block: the Mikazuki Munechika.
notes: Shuffle Time (Sword 7); Rare chests in Tziah (118F, 128F, 132F)

name: Bring me an Outenta Mitsuyo.
details: I would like to see a katana obtainable from Tziah, the fourth block: the Outenta Mitsuyo.
notes: Shuffle Time (Sword 8); Rare chests in Tziah (142F, 150F, 156F)

name: Bring me a Myohou Muramasa.
details: That door that appeared in the lobby... I would like to see the katana obtainable from there: the Myohou Muramasa.
notes: Rare chests in Monad (3F, 8F)

name: Bring me pine resin.
details: I would like some pine resin used by the Archery Club members. 5/2 will most likely be your chance to obtain it.
notes: Obtain from Yukari on 5/2

name: Bring me a handheld game system.
details: I would like to see a handheld game system. Your best opportunity to get it from someone will be on 5/14.
notes: Obtain from Junpei on 5/14

name: Bring me a triangular sword.
details: Please bring me a "triangular sword." I think you will be able to get it from someone on 5/26.
notes: Obtain from Mitsuru on 5/26

name: Bring me a protein not for pros.
details: Bring me protein that's not meant for pros. I'm sure you will be able to acquire it on 6/16.
notes: Obtain from Akihiko on 6/16

name: Bring me a glasses wipe.
details: I would like something used to wipe off spectacles. You should try to get it on 6/20.
notes: Obtain from Ikutsuki on 6/20

name: Bring me a Christmas star.
details: Bring me the item known as a "Christmas star." It should be easily obtainable from someone on 6/27.
notes: Obtain from Fuuka on 6/27

name: Bring me a fruit knife.
details: I'd like to have a fruit knife. There should be no difficulty in acquiring one from someone on 9/17.
notes: Obtain from Shinjiro on 9/17

name: Bring me oil.
details: What I'd really like is some oil. Try to think of who might be the one to give it to you on 10/1.
notes: Obtain from Aigis on 10/1
